title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 488.045 - Costs for impaneling jury to be paid, when
text:
488.045.  Costs for impaneling jury to be paid, when. — At any time after the jury is impaneled, pursuant to the provisions of section 494.480, such defendant shall be liable to the county for the costs associated with impaneling the jury.
(L. 2000 S.B. 1002 Revision)
